<!-- Contributing a brand? This PR should add ONLY a brief. See CONTRIBUTING.md -->

## New brand brief

- **Brand name:**
- **Industry / vibe:**
- **Brief file:** `briefs/<name>.yml`

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR adds **only** `briefs/<name>.yml` (no code, tokens, images or CI changes)
- [ ] Copied from `briefs/_TEMPLATE.yml`; only `name` is required
- [ ] The brand is **fictional** — no real company, logo or trademark
- [ ] Not hateful, deceptive or otherwise abusive

     before anything is merged. You don't need to add any generated files. -->
